title: вЂ‹вЂ‹Apprenticeship assessment qualification-level ConditionsвЂ‹ and requirements
body: "This document sets out the following rules:В     our qualification-level Conditions forВ apprenticeship assessments,В which we have set using our powers underВ section 134 of the Apprenticeships, Skills, Children and Learning Act 2009,В    our requirements in relation to assessment strategies, setting assessments,В markingВ and qualification purposes.В В     With respect to allВ apprenticeship assessments, awardingВ organisations must alsoВ comply with:В     ourВ General Conditions of Recognition, which apply to all awarding organisations and qualifications, andВ    all relevantВ Regulatory Documents.   "
